overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character leading a horse through a rainy night in a frontier Western town. The character walks along wooden boardwalks past a saloon, along a waterfront, and through narrow alleys to reach a bathhouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden freight platform beside train tracks

agents.ego_description: leading a horse by the reins along a wooden walkway beside freight train cars in the rain

notable_agents.action: horse being led calmly alongside the character

entered.detail: wooden boxcars and freight containers lined up on tracks
elevated wooden walkway alongside the freight yard
wooden utility pole with crossbars against the night sky
warm yellow lights from buildings visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The character leads a horse along a wooden freight platform at night during a heavy rainstorm. Wooden train cars line the left side while telegraph poles stand against the dark sky, with distant town lights visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of frontier town with saloon

events.description: passing the front of the two-story saloon building with illuminated windows

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse along the wooden boardwalk past the saloon entrance

notable_agents.action: horse following closely on the reins
pedestrian walking across the muddy street in the distance

entered.detail: large wooden saloon building with multiple lit windows and porch
cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the main street boardwalk, passing a large two-story saloon with glowing windows on the right. The wooden walkway continues past train tracks on the left, with a distant pedestrian visible crossing the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking lake and mountains

events.description: character reaches the waterfront overlook and turns around to head back toward town

agents.ego_description: leading the horse along the waterfront boardwalk then turning back toward the town buildings

notable_agents.action: horse turning with the character at the waterfront

entered.detail: dark water visible beyond the wooden railing reflecting lights
silhouetted mountains against the stormy night sky
simple wooden fence along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks to the edge of town along a wooden dock overlooking a lake and distant mountains. After reaching the overlook, the character turns around, with the horse following, to head back toward the town center.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway leading to bathhouse rear entrance

events.description: entering narrow alley between wooden buildings with clotheslines overhead
arriving at bathhouse rear entrance with green door and lantern light

agents.ego_description: leading the horse through a narrow alleyway and arriving at the bathhouse back door

notable_agents.action: horse being led through the confined alley space

entered.detail: close wooden walls of adjacent buildings creating a tight passage
back of bathhouse building with green door and lit windows
ropes strung between buildings with hanging white garments
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The character leads the horse into a narrow alley between wooden buildings, passing under clotheslines with laundry. The alley opens to the rear of a bathhouse, where the character approaches a green door lit by a warm lantern, with wooden barrels stacked nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched frontier town that shifts from industrial outskirts to the intimate confines of a back alley. It begins beside a wooden freight platform where train cars and telegraph poles stand against a dark, stormy sky. As the character moves forward, the scene opens onto the main street boardwalk, passing the glowing windows of a two-story saloon and crossing paths with a distant pedestrian. The camera then follows the pair to the edge of town along a wooden dock overlooking a lake and distant mountains before turning back toward the town center. Finally, the path narrows into a cramped alleyway beneath hanging laundry, leading the horse toward a warm lantern lighting a green door at the rear of a bathhouse.
